case_title: TRAN KEN VS DELGADO DAVID DBA TRILLIUM GRAPHICS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TRAN KEN AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO DAVID DBA TRILLIUM GRAPHICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,248.00 FILED BY DELGADO DAVID DBA TRILLIUM GRAPHICS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TRAN KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
BOTH CLAIMS SHOW "DELGADO" FOR DEFENDANT, BUT ORIGINAL COUNTER CLAIM SHOWS "SALGADO".
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO DAVID DBA TRILLIUM GRAPHICS
POS ON DAVID DELGADO SUB-SERVED NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN KEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELGADO DAVID DBA TRILLIUM GRAPHICS $2,468.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,476.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DELGADO DAVID DBA TRILLIUM GRAPHICS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT TRAN KEN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,528.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
